mapper.sql: item_id, budget_id, scheme_id, project_id, project_code, project_name, proposed_amount, allocated_amount, item_type, order_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invest_budget_item WHERE budget_id = #{budgetId} ORDER BY order_num ASC, item_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO invest_budget_item ( budget_id, scheme_id, project_id, project_code, project_name, proposed_amount, allocated_amount, item_type, order_num, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES
(#{item.budgetId}, #{item.schemeId}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.projectCode}, #{item.projectName}, #{item.proposedAmount}, #{item.allocatedAmount}, #{item.itemType}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.remark})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM invest_budget_item WHERE item_id IN
#{itemId}
